expectations.text: Calls context_briefing with debug task description
expectations.evidence: Called with task='debug: recall returns empty array even when memories exist in collection' and files=[memory.ts, tools/memory.ts, routes/memory.ts]

expectations.text: Uses search_graph or find_symbol to trace the recall implementation
expectations.evidence: Both search_graph(expandHops=2) and find_symbol(recall) called in parallel in Step 3

expectations.text: Identifies the specific files in the recall chain (e.g., memory.ts, vector-store.ts, routes)
expectations.evidence: Complete chain traced: MCP recall tool -> API route -> memoryService.recall -> embeddingService.embed -> vectorStore.search with exact line numbers

expectations.text: Proposes at least one plausible root cause with evidence from code
expectations.evidence: 3 root causes: supersededBy filter at memory.ts:171, wrong field in context-enrichment.ts:227/241, silent 404 in vector-store.ts:522-525

expectations.text: Suggests a specific code fix (not just 'add logging')
expectations.evidence: 4 fixes: raise supersede threshold 0.85->0.92, change field 'memories'->'results', add warn log for all-superseded, add debug log for 404
